js:
document.querySelectorAll('.prog-card').forEach(card => { card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { this.style.borderColor = 'rgba(34,197,94,0.4)'; this.style.transform = 'translateY(-4px)'; this.style.transition = 'all 0.3s'; }); card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { this.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)'; this.style.transform = 'translateY(0)'; }); });
document.querySelector('.btn-start').addEventListener('click', function() { this.textContent = '✓ Hoş Geldin!'; this.style.background = '#16a34a'; setTimeout(() => { this.textContent = 'Ücretsiz Başla'; this.style.background = '#22c55e'; }, 2000); });
